description_long: This object consists of three distinct armored combat tactical vehicles arranged side by side, each featuring a robust, angular body with a desert camouflage paint scheme. The foremost vehicle is equipped with a prominent front plow or dozer blade, likely for obstacle clearing, and all vehicles have reinforced, sloped armor panels covering the entire body. The middle vehicle is fitted with a rotating turret mounted with a long-barreled cannon and additional roof-mounted equipment, while the others have lower profiles with visible hatches and periscopes. All vehicles have large, rugged tires with deep treads suitable for off-road and urban environments, and the windows are small and reinforced for protection. Antennas and various external fixtures are visible, indicating communication and tactical capabilities. The overall design emphasizes protection, mobility, and versatility for urban combat scenarios.
description: A group of three armored combat tactical vehicles with desert camouflage, reinforced sloped armor, and rugged off-road tires. Features include a front plow, a turret-mounted cannon, and various tactical fixtures.
description_view_0: Side view showing all three vehicles, highlighting the front plow on the first vehicle, the turret and cannon on the middle vehicle, and the angular armored bodies.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back armor, spare tire, and rear hatches of each vehicle, as well as the arrangement of antennas and roof equipment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the length of the vehicles, the turret's cannon, and the side armor details.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the plow blade, reinforced windshields, and the sloped front armor of each vehicle.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One rotating turret with a long-barreled cannon on the middle vehicle (roof-mounted); no visible weapon mounts on the other two vehicles.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped, reinforced armor plating on all vehicles; thickness appears substantial, with angular panels and reinforced doors.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Desert camouflage pattern with irregular tan, brown, and black geometric shapes.
attribute_tire_type: Six large off-road tires per vehicle with deep tread patterns; appear reinforced for heavy-duty use.
